stats_fallback.builder: STX France (now Chantiers de l'Atlantique), Saint-Nazaire; hull started under Aker Yards 2006
stats_fallback.yacht_club_first: First MSC ship with the MSC Yacht Club enclave

deployment.spring_summer_2026: Western Mediterranean 7-night round-trips from Civitavecchia (Rome), Genoa, Naples, Barcelona, and Marseille
deployment.mid_summer_2026: Eastern Mediterranean 9-night from Trieste (Olympia, Athens, Kuşadası, Istanbul, Corfu, Bari)
deployment.winter_2026_27: Canary Islands / Madeira 7-night round-trips — first MSC Yacht Club Canaries week
deployment.notes: Completed 2025-26 South America season with 20-day Montevideo-Barcelona transatlantic in March-April 2026. NOT returning to South America for 2026-27.

history.capacity_uprate: February 2011 at Fincantieri Palermo (capacity raised, crew to 1,370, silicone hull paint)
history.last_drydock: 25 September - 11 October 2023 at Palumbo Malta Shipyard
